ogTitle: Mernda vs Merriang South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mernda and Merriang South.
heading: Mernda vs Merriang South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mernda, Victoria and Merriang South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merriang South has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mernda (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mernda or Merriang South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mernda has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Merriang South scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mernda scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Merriang South scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mernda or Merriang South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merriang South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
